#!/usr/bin/env bash
################################################################################
# Input:
#  $1: extra compilation flags or macro for both libray and application
################################################################################
CWD=$(pwd)

#----- set up the tool name -----
source ../NLIB_CROSS_V5_RV64

#----- build and run switches -----
ENA_BUILD_LIBNN=1
ENA_RUN_CIFAR10=0
ENA_RUN_GRU=0
ENA_RUN_PNET=0
ENA_RUN_MTCNN=0
ENA_RUN_MTCNN_DW=0
ENA_RUN_DW_TEST=0
ENA_RUN_DW_NONSQ_TEST=0
ENA_RUN_UNIT_FUNC=1
RUN_CONFIG=2        #0: run app on board, 1: run app on SID, 2: run app on QEMU
ENA_CLANG=0         #0: use gcc as compiler, 1: use clang as compiler
ENA_RUN_TWICE=0     #0: run function once, 1: run function twice
ENA_VEC_ISA=1       #0: disable v-ext (for measuring plain C algo performance), 1: enable v-ext
ENA_VDOT=1          #0: use the default v-ext algorithm, 1: use vdot v-ext algorithm
ENA_VEC_INTRIN=0    #0: using the inline assembly version v-ext algorithm, 1: use the intrinsic version v-ext algorithm
ENA_HVM=0           #0: place the program's data on cache, 1: place the program's data on HVM
ENA_HPM=0           #0: disable the performance monitor, 1: enable the performance monitor
ENA_ACE_RVV=0       #0: disabe the ACE-RVV, 1: enable the ACE-RVV
ENA_ZVLSSEG=0       #0: disable zvlsseg extension, 1: enable zvlsseg extension
ENA_VL4=1           #0: disable VL4 extension, 1: enable VL4 extension
VEC_CONFIG=4        #0: zve32x, 1: zve32f, 2: zve64x, 3: zve64f, 4: zv64d

#----- flags of library and app -----
CPU_NAME="ax45mpv"
CPU_FLAG="-mtune=andes-45-series"
APP_INCLUDE_PATH="-I./../../Examples/unit_func/include -I./../../Include -I./../../internal"
LIB_INCLUDE_PATH="-I./Include -I./internal"
if [[ ${ENA_VEC_ISA} -eq 1 ]]; then
    if [[ ${VEC_CONFIG} -eq 0 ]]; then
        VEC_CFG="zve32x"
    elif [[ ${VEC_CONFIG} -eq 1 ]]; then
        VEC_CFG="zve32f"
    elif [[ ${VEC_CONFIG} -eq 2 ]]; then
        VEC_CFG="zve64x"
    elif [[ ${VEC_CONFIG} -eq 3 ]]; then
        VEC_CFG="zve64f"
    else
        VEC_CFG="zve64d"
    fi

    CPU_FLAG+=" -mext-vector=${VEC_CFG} -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000"
    # export the VEC_CFG environment variable for selecting the proper QEMU conf
    export VEC_CFG="${VEC_CFG}"
fi
if [[ ${ENA_VEC_ISA} -eq 1 ]] && [[ ${ENA_VDOT} -eq 0 ]]; then
    CPU_FLAG+=" -UENA_NDS_V5_VEC_DOT_PROD"
fi
if [[ ${ENA_VEC_ISA} -eq 1 ]] && [[ ${ENA_ZVLSSEG} -eq 1 ]]; then
    CPU_FLAG+=" -DENA_VEC_ISA_ZVLSSEG"
fi
if [[ ${ENA_VEC_ISA} -eq 1 ]] && [[ ${ENA_CLANG} -eq 1 ]] && [[ ${ENA_VEC_INTRIN} -eq 1 ]]; then
    # please note that now only clang supports RVV intrinsic
    CPU_FLAG+=" -DENA_VEC_INTRINSIC -fno-unroll-loops"
fi
COMMON_CFLAG="${CPU_FLAG} -O3 -Wall -Werror -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -DPF_COUNTER ${1}"    #shared flags for library ad app
if [[ ${ENA_ACE_RVV} -eq 1 ]]; then
    ACE_LIB_PATH=$(readlink -f ${CWD}/../../ace_lib_exp)
    export -p ACE_LIB_PATH="${ACE_LIB_PATH}"
    COMMON_CFLAG+=" -DENA_ACE_RVV -Wa,-mace=${CWD}/../../ace_lib_exp/libacetool.so"
fi
APP_CFLAG="${COMMON_CFLAG} -Wl,-gc-sections -DENA_FS_VS ${APP_INCLUDE_PATH}"
LIB_CFLAG="${COMMON_CFLAG} -fno-strict-aliasing ${LIB_INCLUDE_PATH}"

# enable mvh
if [[ ${RUN_CONFIG} -eq 0 ]] || [[ ${RUN_CONFIG} -eq 2 ]]; then
    APP_CFLAG="${APP_CFLAG} -mvh"
fi

if [[ ${ENA_RUN_TWICE} -eq 1 ]]; then

 * Now ENA_FAST_ALGO switch will be enabled by default.

1	#!/usr/bin/env bash
2	###########################################################################
3	# This script is used to collect the libnn functions' performance with the
4	# built-in libraries.
5	#
6	# Input:
7	#  $1: CPU name
8	#      supported CPU list:
9	#      (1) CPU w/o VPU:      n225, d23, n25, a25, d25, nx25, ax25, a27, n45,
10	#                            a45, d45, nx45, ax45, a46mp, ax46mp, ax65
11	#      (2) 27-series w/ VPU: nx27v, nx27v_elen64, nx27v_elen64_felen64,
12	#                            nx27v_purec
13	#      (3) 45-series w/ VPU: ax45mpv, ax45mpv_elen64, ax45mpv_elen64_felen64,
14	#                            ax45mpv_seg, ax45mpv_elen64_seg,
15	#                            ax45mpv_elen64_felen64_seg, ax45mpv_purec
16	#      (4) 46-series w/ VPU: a46mpv, a46mpv_seg, a46mpv_purec, ax46mpv,
17	#                            ax46mpv_elen64, ax46mpv_elen64_felen64,
18	#                            ax46mpv_seg, ax46mpv_elen64_seg,
19	#                            ax46mpv_elen64_felen64_seg, ax46mpv_purec
20	#      (5) 60-series w/ VPU: ax66, ax66_elen64, ax66_elen64_felen64, ax66_seg,
21	#                            ax66_elen64_seg, ax66_elen64_felen64_seg,
22	#                            ax66_purec
23	#  $2: compiler name
24	#      Now only the elf toolchains are supported and the supported compilers
25	#      are:
26	#        - riscv32-elf-gcc
27	#        - riscv32-elf-clang
28	#        - riscv64-elf-gcc
29	#        - riscv64-elf-clang
30	#  $3: the target to run the executables
31	#      Now the target could only be BOARD.
32	#
33	# Example:
34	#  ex-1: measure the performance on FPGA with D25 bitmap and clang compiler
35	#  ./test_perf.sh "d25" "riscv32-elf-gcc" "BOARD"
36	#
37	#  ex-2: measure the performance on FPGA with AX25 bitmap and clang compiler
38	#  ./test_perf.sh "ax25" "riscv64-elf-clang" "BOARD"
39	#
40	#  ex-3: measure the performance on FPGA with NX27V bitmap and gcc compiler
41	#  ./test_perf.sh "nx27v" "riscv64-elf-gcc" "BOARD"
42	#
43	#  ex-4: measure the pure C algorithm performance on FPGA with NX27V bitmap
44	#  and clang compiler

46	###########################################################################
47	
48	CPU_NAME=${1,,}   ## always convert to lower case
49	COMPILER_NAME="$2"
50	if [ -z ${3} ]; then
51	    TARGET="BOARD"
52	else
53	    TARGET="${3}"
54	fi
55	
56	function log () {

58	}

63	TEST_LOG="test_perf.log"
64	ERROR_LOG="diff_log"

75	    CPU_FLAGS="-mext-dsp"
76	elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^n(x)?45$ ]]; then
77	    CPU_FLAGS="-mtune=andes-45-series"
78	elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(a|d|ax)45$ ]]; then
79	    CPU_FLAGS="-mtune=andes-45-series -mext-dsp"
80	elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(a|ax)46mp$ ]]; then
81	    CPU_FLAGS="-mtune=andes-45-series -mext-dsp -mext-zc"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
###########################################################################
# This script is used to collect the libnn functions' performance with the
# built-in libraries.
#
# Input:
#  $1: CPU name
#      supported CPU list:
#      (1) CPU w/o VPU:      n225, d23, n25, a25, d25, nx25, ax25, a27, n45,
#                            a45, d45, nx45, ax45, a46mp, ax46mp, ax65
#      (2) 27-series w/ VPU: nx27v, nx27v_elen64, nx27v_elen64_felen64,
#                            nx27v_purec
#      (3) 45-series w/ VPU: ax45mpv, ax45mpv_elen64, ax45mpv_elen64_felen64,
#                            ax45mpv_seg, ax45mpv_elen64_seg,
#                            ax45mpv_elen64_felen64_seg, ax45mpv_purec
#      (4) 46-series w/ VPU: a46mpv, a46mpv_seg, a46mpv_purec, ax46mpv,
#                            ax46mpv_elen64, ax46mpv_elen64_felen64,
#                            ax46mpv_seg, ax46mpv_elen64_seg,
#                            ax46mpv_elen64_felen64_seg, ax46mpv_purec
#      (5) 60-series w/ VPU: ax66, ax66_elen64, ax66_elen64_felen64, ax66_seg,
#                            ax66_elen64_seg, ax66_elen64_felen64_seg,
#                            ax66_purec
#  $2: compiler name
#      Now only the elf toolchains are supported and the supported compilers
#      are:
#        - riscv32-elf-gcc
#        - riscv32-elf-clang
#        - riscv64-elf-gcc
#        - riscv64-elf-clang
#  $3: the target to run the executables
#      Now the target could only be BOARD.
#
# Example:
#  ex-1: measure the performance on FPGA with D25 bitmap and clang compiler
#  ./test_perf.sh "d25" "riscv32-elf-gcc" "BOARD"
#
#  ex-2: measure the performance on FPGA with AX25 bitmap and clang compiler
#  ./test_perf.sh "ax25" "riscv64-elf-clang" "BOARD"
#
#  ex-3: measure the performance on FPGA with NX27V bitmap and gcc compiler
#  ./test_perf.sh "nx27v" "riscv64-elf-gcc" "BOARD"
#
#  ex-4: measure the pure C algorithm performance on FPGA with NX27V bitmap
#  and clang compiler
#  ./test_perf.sh "nx27v_purec" "riscv64-elf-clang" "BOARD"
###########################################################################

CPU_NAME=${1,,}   ## always convert to lower case
COMPILER_NAME="$2"
if [ -z ${3} ]; then
    TARGET="BOARD"
else
    TARGET="${3}"
fi

function log () {
    echo "$*" | tee -a ${TEST_LOG}
}

##### misc settings #####
LIB_NAME="libnn"
LIB_ROOT=$(readlink -f `dirname ${0}`)
TEST_LOG="test_perf.log"
ERROR_LOG="diff_log"

# set the proper cflag accrording to the CPU_NAME
if [[ ${CPU_NAME} == n225 ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS="-mext-zc"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} == d23 ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS="-mext-dsp -mext-zc"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^n(x)?25$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS=""
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(a|d|ax)25$ ]] ||
     [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^a27$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS="-mext-dsp"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^n(x)?45$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS="-mtune=andes-45-series"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(a|d|ax)45$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS="-mtune=andes-45-series -mext-dsp"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(a|ax)46mp$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS="-mtune=andes-45-series -mext-dsp -mext-zc"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} == ax65 ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS="-mtune=andes-60-series -DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^nx27v(_elen64|_elen64_felen64)?$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS="-mext-vector -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 -DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^ax45mpv(_elen64(_felen64)?(_seg)?|_seg)?$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS="-mtune=andes-45-series -mext-vector -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 -DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^a46mpv(_seg)?$ ]]; then
    ${COMPILER_NAME} -E -dM - < /dev/null | grep -qw "__riscv_float_abi_soft"
    is_soft_ft_abi=$?
    if [[ ${is_soft_ft_abi} -eq 0 ]]; then
        VEC_CFG="zve32x"
    else
        VEC_CFG="zve32f"
    fi

    CPU_FLAGS="-mtune=andes-45-series -mext-vector=${VEC_CFG} -mext-zc -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 -DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^ax46mpv(_elen64(_felen64)?(_seg)?|_seg?)?$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS="-mtune=andes-45-series -mext-vector -mext-zc -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 -DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^ax66(_elen64(_felen64)?(_seg)?|_seg)?$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS="-mtune=andes-60-series -mext-vector -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 -DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(nx27v|ax45mpv)_purec$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS="-DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(a|ax)46mpv_purec$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS="-DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP -mext-zc"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} == ax66_purec ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS="-mtune=andes-60-series -DENA_RUN_TWICE -DENA_CACHEABLE_ENV_SETUP"
else
    echo "Error! ${1} is not a supported CPU !"
    echo "Supported CPUs are listed below:
- CPU w/o VPU: n225, d23, n25, a25, d25, nx25, ax25, a27, n45, a45, d45, nx45, ax45, a46mp, ax46mp, ax65
- 27-series w/ VPU: nx27v, nx27v_elen64, nx27v_elen64_felen64, nx27v_purec
- 45-series w/ VPU: ax45mpv, ax45mpv_elen64, ax45mpv_elen64_felen64, ax45mpv_seg, ax45mpv_elen64_seg, ax45mpv_elen64_felen64_seg, ax45mpv_purec
- 46-series w/ VPU: a46mpv, a46mpv_seg, a46mpv_purec, ax46mpv, ax46mpv_elen64, ax46mpv_elen64_felen64, ax46mpv_seg, ax46mpv_elen64_seg, ax46mpv_elen64_felen64_seg, ax46mpv_purec
- 60-series w/ VPU: ax66, ax66_elen64, ax66_elen64_felen64, ax66_seg, ax66_elen64_seg, ax66_elen64_felen64_seg, ax66_purec"

    touch "../${ERROR_LOG}"
    exit 1
fi

# check whether the compiler name is valid
if [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(n225|d23|[nad]25|a27|[nad]45)$ ]] ||
   [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^a46mp(v(_purec|_seg)?|)$ ]]; then
    if [[ ! ${COMPILER_NAME} =~ ^riscv32-elf-(gcc|clang)$ ]]; then
        echo -e "Error! Pleas set the compiler to an appropriate one.\n" \
                "The available compilers are:\n" \
                "    riscv32-elf-gcc\n" \
                "    riscv32-elf-clang"
        touch "../${ERROR_LOG}"
        exit 1
    fi
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^[na]x(25|45)$ ]] ||
     [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^nx27v(_elen64(_felen64)?|_purec)?$ ]] ||
     [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^ax(45|46)mpv(_elen64(_felen64)?(_seg)?|_seg|_purec)?$ ]] ||
     [[ ${CPU_NAME} == ax46mp ]] ||
     [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^ax(65|66)$ ]]; then
    if [[ ! ${COMPILER_NAME} =~ ^riscv64-elf-(gcc|clang)$ ]]; then
        echo -e "Error! Pleas set the compiler to an appropriate one.\n" \
                "The available compilers are:\n" \
                "    riscv64-elf-gcc\n" \
                "    riscv64-elf-clang"
        touch "../${ERROR_LOG}"
        exit 1
    fi
else
    # here will not be reached
    echo "Error! ${1} is not a supported CPU !"
fi

# use the customized linker script for moving the data into local memory
if [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(n225|d23|n25|a25|d25|nx25|ax25|a27|n45|a45|d45|nx45|ax45|a46mp|ax46mp)$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS+=" -DENA_LM"
fi

# select the library to be linkd
if [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(nx27v|ax45mpv|a46mpv|ax46mpv|ax66)$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS+=" -lnn_v"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(nx27v|ax45mpv|ax46mpv|ax66)_elen64$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS+=" -lnn_v_elen64"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(nx27v|ax45mpv|ax46mpv|ax66)_elen64_felen64$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS+=" -lnn_v_elen64_felen64"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(ax45mpv|a46mpv|ax46mpv|ax66)_seg$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS+=" -lnn_v_seg"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(ax45mpv|ax46mpv|ax66)_elen64_seg$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS+=" -lnn_v_elen64_seg"
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(ax45mpv|ax46mpv|ax66)_elen64_felen64_seg$ ]]; then
    CPU_FLAGS+=" -lnn_v_elen64_felen64_seg"
else
    CPU_FLAGS+=" -lnn"
fi

# select the running on board wrapper
if [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^ax45mpv(_elen64(_felen64)?(_seg)?|_seg|_purec)?$ ]]; then
   SIM_WRAPPER=$(readlink -f ${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax45mpv/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board)
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^nx27v(_purec|_elen64|_elen64_felen64)?$ ]]; then
   SIM_WRAPPER=$(readlink -f ${LIB_ROOT}/project/nx27v/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board)
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^(n|a)x(25|45)$ ]] ||
     [[ ${CPU_NAME} == ax46mp ]]; then
   SIM_WRAPPER=$(readlink -f ${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax25/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board)
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^a46mpv(_seg|_purec)?$  ]]; then
   SIM_WRAPPER=$(readlink -f ${LIB_ROOT}/project/a46mpv/riscv32-sim-wrapper-on-board)
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^ax46mpv(_elen64(_felen64)?(_seg)?|_seg|_purec)?$ ]]; then
   SIM_WRAPPER=$(readlink -f ${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax46mpv/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board)
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} == ax65 ]]; then
   SIM_WRAPPER=$(readlink -f ${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax65/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board)
elif [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ ^ax66(_elen64(_felen64)?(_seg)?|_seg|_purec)?$ ]]; then
   SIM_WRAPPER=$(readlink -f ${LIB_ROOT}/project/ax66/riscv64-sim-wrapper-on-board)
else
   SIM_WRAPPER=$(readlink -f ${LIB_ROOT}/project/d25/riscv32-sim-wrapper-on-board)
fi

# -----
# Automatically enable the zfh extension if the toolcahin supports it.
# Note-1. We should check whether the zfh extension could be enabled with
# all compilation flags. The zfh extension may be supported by the
# toolchain; however, it's disabled by some compilation flags.
# Note-2. Now the zfh extension is supported only on NX27V and 45-series
# cores.
# -----
# check whether the zfh extension could be enabled
${COMPILER_NAME} -mzfh -E -dM ${CPU_FLAGS} - < /dev/null &> /dev/null
if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
    # check whether the toolchain is [single|double]-abi
    # (for the spcial case of v5 toolchain + clang)
    ${COMPILER_NAME} -mzfh -E -dM ${CPU_FLAGS} - < /dev/null | grep '__riscv_float_abi_single\|__riscv_float_abi_double' &> /dev/null
    if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
        # check whether the core is NX27V/45-series/46-series/60-series
        if [[ ${CPU_NAME} =~ (nx27v|45|46|65|66) ]]; then
            CPU_FLAGS="${CPU_FLAGS} -mzfh"
        fi
    fi
fi

##### main ######
rm -f ${TEST_LOG}
log "***************************************************************************************"
log ${LIB_NAME} performance testing begin ...
log "Input 1(CPU): ${CPU_NAME}"
log "Input 2(COMPILER): ${COMPILER_NAME}"
log "Input 3(TEST_TARGET): ${TARGET}"
log "SIM_WRAPPER: ${SIM_WRAPPER}"
log "EXTRA_CFLAGS: ${CPU_FLAGS}"
log "***************************************************************************************"

EXTRA_CFLAGS="${CPU_FLAGS}"
${LIB_ROOT}/test.sh "" "${COMPILER_NAME}" "${SIM_WRAPPER}" "${TARGET}" "BS3" "${EXTRA_CFLAGS} -DENA_TEST_PERF -DENA_DUMP_PARAMETERS"

log "***************************************************************************************"
log ${LIB_NAME} performance testing end.
log "***************************************************************************************"

# move the log int test_sh_<TIMESTAMP> folder
out_folder_list=($(find . -name "test_sh*" -type d | sort))
mv "test_perf.log" -t "${out_folder_list[${#arr[@]}-1]}"

INCLUDE_DIR="-I${LIB_ROOT}/Include -I${LIB_ROOT}/internal"
DEFAULT_COMPILE_FLAGS="-O3 -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Wall -Werror ${INCLUDE_DIR}"
DEFAULT_DYNAMIC_LIB_FLAG="-fpic"
if [[ ${TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX} == "nds32"* ]] ; then
    DEFAULT_COMPILE_FLAGS="-std=c99 ${DEFAULT_COMPILE_FLAGS}"
elif [[ ${TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX} =~ ^riscv(32|64)* ]] ; then
    DEFAULT_COMPILE_FLAGS+=" -fno-strict-aliasing"
fi
DSP_COMPILE_FLAGS="-mext-dsp"
VEC_COMPILE_FLAGS="-mext-vector -mtune=andes-45-series -mcmodel=large -DENA_VEC_ISA -DMAX_VLEN=1024 -DNDS_VEC_RVV_VERSION=1000 -DENA_NDS_V5_VEC_DOT_PROD -fno-tree-slp-vectorize -fno-tree-vectorize -mno-16-bit"
CUR_COMPILE_FLAG=""
CUR_LOG_FILE="build_lib.log"
CWD=$(pwd)

LIB_NAME_P_A="${LIB_NAME}_p.a"
LIB_NAME_V_A="${LIB_NAME}_v.a"
LIB_NAME_V_ELEN64_A="${LIB_NAME}_v_elen64.a"
LIB_NAME_V_ELEN64_FELEN64_A="${LIB_NAME}_v_elen64_felen64.a"
LIB_NAME_V_SEG_A="${LIB_NAME}_v_seg.a"
LIB_NAME_V_ELEN64_SEG_A="${LIB_NAME}_v_elen64_seg.a"
LIB_NAME_V_ELEN64_FELEN64_SEG_A="${LIB_NAME}_v_elen64_felen64_seg.a"
LIB_NAME_SO="${LIB_NAME}.so"

LIB_NAME_V_SEG_SO="${LIB_NAME}_v_seg.so"
LIB_NAME_V_ELEN64_SEG_SO="${LIB_NAME}_v_elen64_seg.so"
LIB_NAME_V_ELEN64_FELEN64_SEG_SO="${LIB_NAME}_v_elen64_felen64_seg.so"
MAKE="make -f ${LIB_ROOT}/Makefile_lib.mak CROSS_COMPILE="${TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX}-" CC="${CC}""

# (remember to move nds_version.c to LIB_ROOT)
sh ${LIB_ROOT}/nds_autogen_info.sh "libnn"
mv nds_version.c "${LIB_ROOT}/Source"

# change directory back to CWD
cd ${CWD}

# start building process
if [[ ${TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX} == *"linux"* ]]; then
    echo "Building multi-lib of ${LIB_NAME} for ${TOOLCHAIN_PREFIX} toolchain ..."

        MULTI_LIB_STR=`echo ${MULTI_LIB_STR} | sed 's/\.;/lib32\/ilp32d;/g'`
    else

For the default `ax45mpv` target: **same active path - #4 at L311** (tiling + V5 vdot, inline asm).

Key differences though:

| Aspect | `project/ax45mpv/run.sh` | `test_perf.sh ax45mpv` |
|---|---|---|
| Library | Compiles libnn from source with current flags | Links prebuilt `libnn_v.a` via `-lnn_v` (line 157) |
| `ENA_NDS_V5_VEC_DOT_PROD` | Defined unless `ENA_VDOT=0` | Baked in at library build time (`build_default_library.sh:110`) |

| `ENA_VEC_ELEN64` | Depends on `VEC_CONFIG` (0-4) | Depends on CPU variant name |
